targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT vessel_id) AS value FROM telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 seconds'
SELECT ROUND(AVG(drag_reduction_pct)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 seconds'
SELECT ROUND(AVG(quantum_coherence_pct)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 seconds' AND quantum_coherence_pct IS NOT NULL
SELECT ROUND(SUM(co2_kg_per_hour)::numeric, 1) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vessel_id) co2_kg_per_hour FROM telemetry ORDER BY vessel_id, time DESC) t

SELECT time_bucket('10 seconds', t.time) AS time, v.name AS metric, AVG(t.drag_reduction_pct) AS value FROM telemetry t JOIN vessels v ON v.id=t.vessel_id WHERE t.time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('10 seconds', t.time) AS time, v.name AS metric, AVG(t.fuel_burn_rate_lph) AS value FROM telemetry t JOIN vessels v ON v.id=t.vessel_id WHERE t.time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('10 seconds', t.time) AS time, v.name AS metric, AVG(t.quantum_coherence_pct) AS value FROM telemetry t JOIN vessels v ON v.id=t.vessel_id WHERE t.time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND t.quantum_coherence_pct IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('30 seconds', t.time) AS time, v.name AS metric, AVG(t.fuel_level_pct) AS value FROM telemetry t JOIN vessels v ON v.id=t.vessel_id WHERE t.time > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1
